name: Yummy Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Combine cookie mix, contents of peanut butter packet from Mix, egg, and 1 tablespoon water in a large bowl. Stir until thoroughly blended. Stir in chopped peanuts.
For white glaze, place confectioners' sugar in a small bowl. Add water, 1 teaspoon at a time, stirring until smooth and desired consistency. Drizzle over cooled bars.
For chocolate glaze, place semi-sweet chocolate chips and Crisco shortening in a small resealable plastic bag. Seal the bag and place it in a bowl of hot water for several minutes. Dry with a paper towel. Knead until blended and chocolate is smooth. Snip a pinpoint hole in the corner of the bag. Drizzle chocolate glaze over white glaze. Allow glazes to set before cutting into bars.
Makes 18 bars.
Tip: For a special presentation, cut cookies into diamond or triangle shapes instead of bars.
